title: Zero's Bunch O' Stuff
description: A relatively basic mod that currently expands on amethyst uses and sculk expansion, with more to come!
body:
This mod as of current focuses on the widely unused portions of the game, bringing them new life.

The first of which is the End Crystal and Amethyst Shard, now helping to create...
![Crystarite Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c09153d32812d9bdeda133d41370f05b75e1e96f.png)
Crystarite is a brand new material, sacrificing durability for function.
The new tools all include their own specialty move, (except the hoe) allowing for a fresh but not too powerful experience.


### _CRYSTARITE SWORD_
![Sword Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/933b5dabf18ef8e233fdfdbf4127e08577d10022.gif)

The Crystarite Sword features the ability to release a powerful explosion upon a right click, with the cost of a lengthy cooldown.
Great for getting that one extra kill in a tricky situation.

### _CRYSTARITE PICKAXE_
![Pickaxe Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5a3d6525cc71cf39082370c1484f000013d6d20.gif)

The Crystarite Pickaxe grants the user haste II when you break a block with a 1% chance. It allows for insta-mine without the use of a beacon as long as you have efficiency 5.

### _CRYSTARITE AXE_
![Axe Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/556c20b33f975a5b0028329ec0f6395667808b6a.gif)
![Axe Ability PT2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c259a64675da62ebfd1cde6c2bb68caa867ce33.gif)

The Crystarite Axe has a 20% chance when hitting any entity to do and extra 30 damage. (15 hearts)
This axe is incredibly powerful for pvp, as long as you're lucky.

### _CRYSTARITE SHOVEL_
![Shovel Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ff945b53b11055d7ad9f35c20dfc19f9f93881c.gif)

The Crystarite Shovel doesn't do much special, it's just a really fast shovel.
Great for large excavations as long as you can deal with the lower durability.

### _CRYSTARITE ARMOR_
Finally the Crystarite Armor, which was shown in the banner image.
This armor grants some small, but quite useful buffs when the full set is equipped.

To create this armor and the tools there's a Crystarite Upgrade Template, at the moment only craftable. Hoping to change this soon to be similar to the netherite one.

![Crystarites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e18ba6d6db810f463e30aac716cbf9e62d639f81.png)
There's also the 3 variants of Crystarites.

### _UNSTABLE CRYSTARITE_
On the far left is the Unstable Crystarite.
The Unstable Crystarite acts as a pocket End Crystal, sacrificing yourself at the reward of destroying everything in the vicinity.
Basically a kamikaze.

### _PURE CRYSTARITE_
In the middle being the most important is the Pure Crystarite.
Pure Crystarite is used as purely a crafting ingredient for all the Crystarite tools and the armor set.

### _SOUL-INFUSED CRYSTARITE_
On the right is the Soul-Infused Crystarite, used to open the portal to the other side, to The Alternate.

![The Alternate Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75c4eeea0e7431a5ba879fa8513d52aae9656bd6.png)
### _THE ALTERNATE_
_The portal is made with reinforced deepslate by the way!_

The Alternate is a brand new dimension featuring new mobs, biomes, ores, and more!
The biomes include the Sculk Forest, filled with brand new trees and shrubs to fill the landscape. There's then the Sculk Plains, being quite similar to the Sculk Forest just without the trees, and some extra tentacles sprinkled throughout. Then there's the Sculk Heights which instead of the ground being Sculk blocks and Sculk Crust, it's made up of the new stone, Grimstone. The vanilla biome the Deep Dark also spawns here, just underground. There is also a new mob, the Sculkasite which will attack you upon sight. Low health, just annoying.

![Grimstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d44218ef68ea0efd1ba1678ff7914cdb2f57e550_0.webp)
### _GRIMSTONE_
Grimstone is The Alternate's version of stone or deepslate for example. Currently it's craftable into a few new decorative blocks, but more will come eventually. The biggest part of this block is it's strippable with an axe, just like a log is. Stripping Grimstone presents the new Stripped Grimstone, dropping a sculk vein on its way. The Stripped Grimstone is a great new addition for texturing your cobblestone builds.

![Sculk Wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d82f9a524aaacc8558af6d8c011d70c9602fc82.png)
### _SCULK WOODSET_
Another set of blocks held within The Alternate is the Sculk woodset. This wood provides a nice blue hue for building, or a wood to survive in the harsh conditions of The Alternate.


### _GIGANTIC GOLDEN APPLE (GIGA GAP)_
![Giga Gap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bf08fea98e61d3eb8aa71a7bea4fe0661a1a878.gif)

The Gigantic Golden Apple (aka the Giga Gap) is a new consumable item that increases almost all your stats and enlarges the player. It's obviously very overpowered, probably already overdue for nerfs.

![Warditions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bf648823ff7ba20df26a550649321a3aa2e15fe.png)
Next are some new items (more coming soon) that are related to the warden, giving an actual reason to hunt it down.

### _WARDEN HEART_
The Warden Heart is the new drop replacement from the warden, getting rid of the random sculk catalyst.
The Warden Heart is used in just a couple recipes at the moment, but more will definitely exist upon full release.

### _ECHO TOTEM_
The Echo Totem is a brand new totem.
It's weaker than a normal totem, however it's craftable and still saves your life.

![Totem Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e8eb1618fb10ac4c0ad1feb34731bbd2a02d01.gif)

There's also some new potions, specifically calling out the Echoing Sight potion.
Echoing Sight basically turns you into a warden.
You can barely see at all, but you know where every. single. entity. is.
![Echoing Sight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80ff5c1e062bf61c3e64079eff2031e3d80ab262_0.webp)

![Wind Chimes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f7e01242068703cc72333618b628cdf9ae32fb8.png)
Another item in the mod is the Wind Chimes. In the photo above, there's only iron ones, however in recent updates there's been copper and gold chimes added with their own unique textures, models, and sounds.

Not everything was mentioned here, so be sure to check out the mod for yourself to discover everything there is to uncover!

Also, feel free to include this mod in any modpacks, videos, or anything similar!
